case.title: WASILEWSKI v. BOARD OF SCHOOL DIRECTORS, MILWAUKEE

opinion.h1: WASILEWSKI v. BOARD OF SCHOOL DIRECTORS, MILWAUKEE, 370 U.S. 720 (1962)
opinion.h4: WASILEWSKI v. BOARD OF SCHOOL DIRECTORS OF THE CITY OF MILWAUKEE. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF WISCONSIN. No. 1124, Misc. Decided June 25, 1962.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
opinion.h4: CITY CENTER MOTEL v. FLORIDA HOTEL, RESTAURANT COMM'N, 370 U.S. 720 (1962)
opinion.p: 370 U.S. 720 CITY CENTER MOTEL, INC., v. FLORIDA HOTEL AND RESTAURANT COMMISSION. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF FLORIDA, FIRST APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 920. Decided June 25, 1962.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
